creator: wblock@wonkity.com
text:
The bsdinstall keymap selection offers a list of keymaps along with OK
and Cancel buttons.  But many users will not know which of several
choices to pick.  Pressing Escape at this screen selects the default
keymap.  There should be a third button labeled Use Default Keymap which
does the same thing but tells the user that such a choice is possible.

How-To-Repeat: Run 'bsdinstall keymap'.
